slices.title: Add note management controls to mockup
slices.jtbd: When viewing the notes interface, I want to see explicit controls to create, edit, and delete notes, so that I can manage my content directly from the main view.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given I am on the main notes interface, When I want to create a new note, Then a Floating Action Button is visible.
Given a note in the search results, When I hover or interact with it, Then edit and delete buttons are accessible.
slices.tocConstraintRef: missing CRUD controls in approved mockup
slices.sixSigmaMetric: reduce missing essential CRUD UI controls from 3 to 0
